interpretation.deterministicForward: After the shared advance to startYear P2, G._wlHarnessDeterministic=true so advTurn skips rival AI, random events, rival reformats, talent events, etc. (legacy simQuiet path).
interpretation.scopedLayer: When layer is ON, window.__WL_TALENT_PERF_VALIDATION_STATION_ID__ limits talent-performance multipliers to the tracked station; competitors behave as if the layer were off for them.
interpretation.paths: on_no_cut = layer ON scoped, no cut; on_cut = layer ON scoped + salary cut; off_cut = layer OFF globally + same cut. Compare whether erosion is layer-attributable (on_cut vs off_cut) vs baseline drift (off_cut vs on_no).
interpretation.successCriteriaHint: Look for on_cut worse than on_no on share/rank/rev by +5y, on_cut worse than off_cut (layer amplifies cut pain), and widening gap vs +1y (gradual). Personality-heavy formats should show larger layer deltas than weak-personality formats in aggregate.
